scripts.validate: node scripts/check-version-sources.mjs && node scripts/validate.mjs && node scripts/protocol-inventory.mjs --check-docs
scripts.validate:all: node scripts/check-version-sources.mjs && node scripts/validate.mjs && node scripts/protocol-inventory.mjs --check-docs
scripts.validate:plugin: node scripts/check-version-sources.mjs && node scripts/validate.mjs --plugin && node scripts/protocol-inventory.mjs --check-docs --plugin
